level_signals: 2+ years of experience in strategy, operations, consulting, analytics, or GTM/revenue operations
Comp range $87K–$128K base consistent with mid-level associate role
Title is 'Senior Associate' reporting to a Sr. Manager

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: You have 2+ years of experience in strategy, operations, consulting, analytics, or GTM/revenue operations
You have strong analytical skills with proficiency in SQL and advanced Excel skills
You have experience working with AI tools such as Claude, Cursor, GitHub, etc. and know how to scale your impact through the use of AI powered tools, skills, and processes
You have an entrepreneurial mindset with a bias for action — comfortable building from zero to one in an unstructured environment
You have a strong work ethic and are willing to put in the effort required to move fast and deliver results in a high-growth, fast-paced setting
You communicate clearly across audiences and collaborate effectively with cross-functional partners

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: We are especially excited about candidates who have worked in fast-moving or resource-constrained environments - those who see lack of structure as an opportunity to build.

scope.surface: GTM Strategy & Operations for DoorDash Commerce Platform (B2B SaaS for restaurants)
core_responsibilities: Own the intelligence layer behind the GTM engine - analyzing conversion patterns, lead attributes, and pipeline performance
Build prioritization frameworks that help sales reps focus on highest-value accounts
Partner with sales team to identify opportunities that exponentially increase velocity
Design, build, and maintain AI-powered tools that improve GTM efficiency
Support the design and buildout of a scalable inbound funnel
Create and maintain systems, infrastructure, and processes that enable a high-performing sales organization

green_flags: High-visibility initiative backed directly by senior leadership
Early-stage-startup autonomy with public company resources
Clear reporting structure (GTM Sr. Manager) and team context (DoorDash Commerce Platform)
Broad scope across GTM strategy, analytics, AI tools, and sales enablement — strong learning opportunity
red_flags: Location and remote eligibility are not stated anywhere in the JD body — unclear whether this is hybrid, onsite, or remote
Role requires wearing many hats simultaneously (analyst, builder, operator, GTM partner) which may indicate under-staffing
Posting does not specify office location(s) despite base salary being 'localized according to an employee's work location'

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from title 'Senior Associate', comp range, and years required)
scope.team_size_estimate (described as 'small' in JD body; exact number not stated)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities; not explicitly listed in JD)
scope.business_model (inferred from product description as B2B SaaS)
ambiguities: Location/work model is never specified in the JD body. The pay section references national range plus Illinois and Colorado, suggesting some remote eligibility, but no explicit remote/hybrid/onsite designation is given.

The 'nice to have' for fast-moving/resource-constrained environments is framed as 'especially excited about' rather than a formal preferred qualifier — could be interpreted as a soft must-have. Treated as nice-to-have here.

All six bullets under 'We're excited about you because...' are written as unconditional statements, suggesting hard requirements; however, only 2+ years experience and SQL/Excel are clearly hard skills — cultural fit items classified as hard per JD language but flagged here.
